description: Visualize active-site residue alignment and key divergences between LPL1 (phospholipase B) and ROG1 (MAG lipase)
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create detailed active-site residue comparison
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 8))
fig.suptitle('Active-Site Environment Comparison (8Å from Catalytic Ser)', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Panel A: Residue-by-residue alignment of active-site environment
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_title('A. Active-Site Residue Alignment', fontweight='bold')

# Manually aligned active-site residues based on structural/sequence correspondence
# Format: (Ca_LPL1 res#, Ca_LPL1 aa, Sc_LPL1 res#, Sc_LPL1 aa, ROG1 res#, ROG1 aa, role)
aligned_residues = [
    (23, 'I', 11, 'I', None, '-', 'hydrophobic core'),
    (24, 'H', 12, 'H', 195, 'H', 'oxyanion hole (HG)'),
    (25, 'G', 13, 'G', 196, 'G', 'oxyanion hole (HG)'),
    (26, 'L', 14, 'L', 197, 'L', 'hydrophobic core'),
    (102, 'G', 88, 'G', 267, 'G', 'GXSXG motif pos1'),
    (103, 'Y', 89, 'Y', 268, 'H', 'GXSXG motif pos2 ★'),
    (104, 'S', 90, 'S', 269, 'S', 'CATALYTIC SER'),
    (105, 'L', 91, 'Q', 270, 'L', 'GXSXG motif pos4'),
    (106, 'G', 92, 'G', 271, 'G', 'GXSXG motif pos5'),
    (107, 'G', 93, 'G', 272, 'G', 'after motif'),
    (108, 'L', 94, 'L', 273, 'L', 'after motif'),
    (133, 'T', 121, 'T', 300, 'T', 'downstream loop'),
    (134, 'F', 122, 'M', 301, 'L', 'substrate pocket'),
    (135, 'A', 123, 'A', 302, 'A', 'conserved'),
    (136, 'T', 124, 'T', 303, 'S', 'conservative'),
    (137, 'P', 125, 'P', 304, 'P', 'conserved'),
    (138, 'H', 126, 'H', 305, 'L', 'DIVERGENT ★★'),
    (206, 'D', 199, 'D', 372, 'D', 'CATALYTIC ASP'),
    (504, 'H', 414, 'H', 552, 'H', 'CATALYTIC HIS'),
]

# Draw as a table
y_pos = 0.95
header = f"{'Ca_LPL1':>12}  {'Sc_LPL1':>12}  {'Sc_ROG1':>12}  {'Role':<25}"
ax1.text(0.02, y_pos, header, fontfamily='monospace', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold',
         transform=ax1.transAxes)
y_pos -= 0.03
ax1.text(0.02, y_pos, '-' * 70, fontfamily='monospace', fontsize=7, 
         transform=ax1.transAxes)
y_pos -= 0.03

for ca_num, ca_aa, sc_num, sc_aa, rog_num, rog_aa, role in aligned_residues:
    # Color-code differences
    rog_str = f"{rog_aa}{rog_num}" if rog_num else f"{rog_aa:>4}"
    ca_sc_match = ca_aa == sc_aa
    ca_rog_match = ca_aa == rog_aa
    
    # Highlight divergent positions
    if '★' in role:
        color = 'red'
        weight = 'bold'
    elif 'CATALYTIC' in role:
        color = 'darkgreen'
        weight = 'bold'
    elif ca_sc_match and not ca_rog_match:
        color = 'blue'  # LPL1 shared, ROG1 different
        weight = 'normal'
    else:
        color = 'black'
        weight = 'normal'
    
    line = f"  {ca_aa}{ca_num:>4}       {sc_aa}{sc_num:>4}      "
    if rog_num:
        line += f" {rog_aa}{rog_num:>4}     "
    else:
        line += f"  {rog_aa:>4}     "
    line += f" {role}"
    
    ax1.text(0.02, y_pos, line, fontfamily='monospace', fontsize=7.5,
             color=color, fontweight=weight, transform=ax1.transAxes)
    y_pos -= 0.035

# Legend
y_pos -= 0.03
ax1.text(0.02, y_pos, 'Colors:', fontfamily='monospace', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold',
         transform=ax1.transAxes)
y_pos -= 0.025
ax1.text(0.02, y_pos, '  Green = catalytic triad', fontfamily='monospace', fontsize=7,
         color='darkgreen', transform=ax1.transAxes)
y_pos -= 0.025
ax1.text(0.02, y_pos, '  Red = key divergent positions (★)', fontfamily='monospace', fontsize=7,
         color='red', transform=ax1.transAxes)
y_pos -= 0.025
ax1.text(0.02, y_pos, '  Blue = LPL1 shared, ROG1 different', fontfamily='monospace', fontsize=7,
         color='blue', transform=ax1.transAxes)

# Panel B: Key differences visualization
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title('B. Key Active-Site Divergences', fontweight='bold')

# Bar chart showing key positions
positions = ['GxSxG\npos2', 'Loop\npos134/122', 'Critical\npos138/126']
ca_vals = [1, 1, 1]  # Y, F, H
sc_vals = [1, 0.7, 1]  # Y, M, H
rog_vals = [0, 0.3, 0]  # H, L, L

x = np.arange(len(positions))
width = 0.25

# Use text annotations instead of bars
ax2.set_xlim(-0.5, 2.5)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 4)
ax2.set_xticks(x)
ax2.set_xticklabels(positions)
ax2.set_yticks([])

# Draw residue boxes
for i, pos_label in enumerate(positions):
    # Ca_LPL1
    aa_ca = ['Y103', 'F134', 'H138'][i]
    ax2.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((i-0.35, 2.8), 0.22, 0.8, facecolor='#6699ff', edgecolor='black'))
    ax2.text(i-0.24, 3.2, aa_ca, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
    
    # Sc_LPL1
    aa_sc = ['Y89', 'M122', 'H126'][i]
    ax2.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((i-0.11, 2.8), 0.22, 0.8, facecolor='#66cc66', edgecolor='black'))
    ax2.text(i, 3.2, aa_sc, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
    
    # Sc_ROG1
    aa_rog = ['H268', 'L301', 'L305'][i]
    color = '#ff6666' if aa_rog[0] != aa_ca[0] else '#ff9999'
    ax2.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((i+0.13, 2.8), 0.22, 0.8, facecolor=color, edgecolor='black'))
    ax2.text(i+0.24, 3.2, aa_rog, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# Labels
ax2.text(-0.24, 3.8, 'Ca_LPL1', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='#336699', fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(0, 3.8, 'Sc_LPL1', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='#339933', fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(0.24, 3.8, 'Sc_ROG1', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='#cc3333', fontweight='bold')

# Annotations
ax2.text(0, 2.3, 'GXSXG motif: Y (aromatic) in LPL1\nvs H (basic) in ROG1', 
         ha='center', fontsize=8, fontstyle='italic')
ax2.text(1, 1.7, 'Substrate pocket: F/M (bulky) in LPL1\nvs L (small) in ROG1', 
         ha='center', fontsize=8, fontstyle='italic')
ax2.text(2, 1.1, 'Key position: H (His) in BOTH LPL1s\nvs L (Leu) in ROG1 — strongly\nsuggests functional divergence', 
         ha='center', fontsize=8, fontstyle='italic', color='red')

# Summary box
ax2.text(1, 0.3, 
         'CONCLUSION: LPL1 active sites share 3 key\nresidues that DIFFER from ROG1, consistent\nwith different substrate specificity',
         ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='orange', lw=2))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('active_site_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Active site comparison figure saved")
